prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I predict future market movements with certainty or perform live market analysis. It does not incorporate recent news, company-specific developments, broader market sentiment, or technical analysis indicators which are crucial for precise forecasting. The confidence intervals are derived from an estimated 7-day standard deviation (volatility) applied to a normal distribution model around the point estimate.
